name: Exemption from Distilled Spirits Taxes for Wine Production

eligibility.description: Must be a proprietor of a bonded wine cellar using wine spirits for wine production in compliance with subchapter rules and without knowing violation of the law.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Proprietors of bonded wine cellars are exempt from the distilled spirits tax (IRC 5001) on wine spirits used in the production of wine on their premises.
